mapper.sql: SELECT id, material_id, material_code, batch_no, supplier_batch_no, supplier_brand, supplier_item_no, purify_no, clone_no, concentration, concentration_update_time, expire_date, qc_data, coa_link, inbound_date, production_date, project_no, naked_finish_code, naked_finish_batch, buffer_solution, erp_sync_remark, status, is_deleted, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM batch WHERE is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: AND material_id = #{materialId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
AND material_code = #{materialCode} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO batch ( material_id, material_code, batch_no, supplier_batch_no, supplier_brand, supplier_item_no, purify_no, clone_no, concentration, concentration_update_time, expire_date, qc_data, coa_link, inbound_date, production_date, project_no, naked_finish_code, naked_finish_batch, buffer_solution, erp_sync_remark, status, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{materialId}, #{materialCode}, #{batchNo}, #{supplierBatchNo}, #{supplierBrand}, #{supplierItemNo}, #{purifyNo}, #{cloneNo}, #{concentration}, #{concentrationUpdateTime}, #{expireDate}, #{qcData}, #{coaLink}, #{inboundDate}, #{productionDate}, #{projectNo}, #{nakedFinishCode}, #{nakedFinishBatch}, #{bufferSolution}, #{erpSyncRemark}, #{status}, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE batch
material_id = #{materialId}, material_code = #{materialCode}, batch_no = #{batchNo}, supplier_batch_no = #{supplierBatchNo}, supplier_brand = #{supplierBrand}, supplier_item_no = #{supplierItemNo}, purify_no = #{purifyNo}, clone_no = #{cloneNo}, concentration = #{concentration}, concentration_update_time = #{concentrationUpdateTime}, expire_date = #{expireDate}, qc_data = #{qcData}, coa_link = #{coaLink}, inbound_date = #{inboundDate}, production_date = #{productionDate}, project_no = #{projectNo}, naked_finish_code = #{nakedFinishCode}, naked_finish_batch = #{nakedFinishBatch}, buffer_solution = #{bufferSolution}, erp_sync_remark = #{erpSyncRemark}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE batch SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM batch WHERE batch_no = #{batchNo} AND is_deleted = 0 AND id != #{excludeId}

SELECT b.id, b.material_id, b.material_code, b.batch_no, b.supplier_batch_no, b.supplier_brand, b.supplier_item_no, b.purify_no, b.clone_no, b.concentration, b.concentration_update_time, b.expire_date, b.qc_data, b.coa_link, b.inbound_date, b.production_date, b.project_no, b.naked_finish_code, b.naked_finish_batch, b.buffer_solution, b.erp_sync_remark, b.status, b.is_deleted, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time, b.remark FROM batch b WHERE b.is_deleted = 0
AND b.material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialCode}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_material m WHERE m.material_code = b.material_code AND m.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialName}, '%') AND m.del_flag = 0 )
AND b.batch_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{batchNo}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM inv_inventory i WHERE i.batch_id = b.id AND i.warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode} AND i.is_deleted = 0 )
AND b.status = #{qcStatus}
ORDER BY b.create_time DESC
